# appinsights-instrumentation

Guidance for instrumenting webapps with Azure Application Insights. Provides telemetry patterns, SDK setup, and configuration references. WHEN: how to instrument app, App Insights SDK, telemetry patterns, what is App Insights, Application Insights guidance, instrumentation examples, APM best practices.

**Skill:** `appinsights-instrumentation` | [View source](https://github.com/microsoft/GitHub-Copilot-for-Azure/tree/main/plugin/skills/appinsights-instrumentation) | [View triggers](https://github.com/microsoft/GitHub-Copilot-for-Azure/tree/main/tests/appinsights-instrumentation) | Platform: [GitHub Copilot for Azure](/azure/developer/github-copilot-azure/overview)

## Prerequisites

- **Azure authentication** — Sign in with `az login` or use a service principal.
- **Azure subscription** — An active Azure subscription is required.
- **GitHub Copilot** — GitHub Copilot with the Azure extension enabled.

### Required tools

- **GitHub Copilot**
- **Azure CLI** (v2.60.0+) — Install: `curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | sudo bash`

## What it provides

The **appinsights-instrumentation** skill gives GitHub Copilot deep knowledge about Azure services and tools related to appinsights-instrumentation.





## Example prompts

Try these prompts with GitHub Copilot:

- "Instrument my webapp to send telemetry to App Insights"
- "How do I instrument my app with Azure App Insights?"
